mapper.sql: emp_plan_id, oprtr_nm, oprtr_nm_en, addr, lglrpr_nm, icao_desig, regis_mark_list, aoc_no, aoc_isue_dt, aoc_xpr_dt, aoc_athrty_nm, parent_co_nm, sbsdry_info, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM emp.tn_emp_oprtr_info WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_oprtr_info (emp_plan_id, oprtr_nm, oprtr_nm_en, addr, lglrpr_nm, icao_desig, regis_mark_list, aoc_no, aoc_isue_dt, aoc_xpr_dt, aoc_athrty_nm, parent_co_nm, sbsdry_info, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{empPlanId}, #{oprtrNm}, #{oprtrNmEn}, #{addr}, #{lglrprNm}, #{icaoDesig}, #{regisMarkList}, #{aocNo}, #{aocIsueDt}, #{aocXprDt}, #{aocAthrtyNm}, #{parentCoNm}, #{sbsdryInfo}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE emp.tn_emp_oprtr_info SET oprtr_nm = #{oprtrNm}, oprtr_nm_en = #{oprtrNmEn}, addr = #{addr}, lglrpr_nm = #{lglrprNm}, icao_desig = #{icaoDesig}, regis_mark_list = #{regisMarkList}, aoc_no = #{aocNo}, aoc_isue_dt = #{aocIsueDt}, aoc_xpr_dt = #{aocXprDt}, aoc_athrty_nm = #{aocAthrtyNm}, parent_co_nm = #{parentCoNm}, sbsdry_info = #{sbsdryInfo}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE emp_plan_id = #{empPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp.tn_emp_oprtr_info (emp_plan_id, oprtr_nm, oprtr_nm_en, addr, lglrpr_nm, icao_desig, regis_mark_list, aoc_no, aoc_isue_dt, aoc_xpr_dt, aoc_athrty_nm, parent_co_nm, sbsdry_info, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstEmpPlanId}, oprtr_nm, oprtr_nm_en, addr, lglrpr_nm, icao_desig, regis_mark_list, aoc_no, aoc_isue_dt, aoc_xpr_dt, aoc_athrty_nm, parent_co_nm, sbsdry_info, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM emp.tn_emp_oprtr_info WHERE emp_plan_id = #{srcEmpPlanId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
